text:
Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 is the soundtrack album to the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time, released on 17 March 2021. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICA-2586~8. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287
